The `COMPLEXITY_SKIP.hotfix = ["taskify", "plan", "review", "review-fix"]` config is correctly defined and used during pipeline execution. {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/Kody-Engine-Tester/Kody-Engine-Tester/.kody/tasks/hotfix-2484-260418-035159/plan.md","content":"# Plan: Fix Build Failures (Missing Default Exports in Next.js Pages)

## Context

The `pnpm build` step fails with TypeScript errors because several files in `src/pages/` are missing **default exports**. Next.js Pages Router requires every file in the `pages/` directory to have a default export. The specific failing files are:

- `src/pages/board/modal.tsx` — component only, no default export
- `src/pages/error/ErrorPage.tsx` — named export only
- `src/pages/error/NotFoundPage.tsx` — named export only

The task description says "Fix the missing default export in `src/utils/helpers.ts`" but that file already has a default export at line 51 (`export default helpers`). The actual build-breaking errors are in the `pages/` directory files listed above.

## Changes

### 1. `src/pages/error/ErrorPage.tsx`
Change the named export to a default export:… [+1127 chars]
